title: Cloudflare Just Revealed Its WordPress Alternative
description:
This video breaks down Cloudflare’s major move into the future of website building after revealing its WordPress alternative through Astro and EmDash. Learn why Cloudflare acquiring Astro matters for developers, freelancers, creators, and anyone building websites for clients. We’ll explore how Astro, Cloudflare Workers, R2, D1, and EmDash work together to create a faster, more modern, AI-ready website stack that could challenge traditional CMS platforms like WordPress.

Discover how this new Cloudflare CMS approach could simplify client website builds, reduce maintenance issues, improve security, and make content editing easier with AI tools like Claude and ChatGPT. If you build websites, manage client content, or want to understand where modern web development is heading, this update is worth watching.

We compare plain text prompts vs structured JSON prompts side-by-side using real infographic examples. Then we show how simply changing one value in your JSON can update your entire design without breaking layout or style.

By the end of this video, you’ll understand how to:

Structure prompts using JSON
Separate data vs design instructions
Fix inconsistent AI outputs
Create repeatable visual systems
Scale your AI workflows efficiently
